name: get_available_slots
description: Call this ONCE at the start of STEP 4 (scheduling). Returns all available slots for the next 3 days (tomorrow, day after tomorrow, two days after tomorrow) in a single response — no need to call again for different days or periods. The response has a 'days' array with 3 entries. Each day has 'morning', 'afternoon', 'evening' blocks. Each block has 'has_slots' (true/false) and 'offer_speech' (e.g. '10 AM or 11 AM') — read offer_speech directly to the customer. Each block also has 'all_slots' — use this when the customer gives a custom time frame: pick the 2 slots from all_slots closest to what they asked. Use the exact 'start' value from the chosen slot when calling book_slot. If scheduling_window_exhausted is true, no slots exist in any of the 3 days — use the handoff script.
